name: Chickpea Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the chickpeas overnight in water to cover. Alternatively, use the quick-soaking method.
2. Drain and add water to cover a depth of 1 inch. Add salt and simmer for 2 hours or longer until tender.
3. Heat oil in a saucepan. Add onions and cook until wilted.
4. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, water, and spices. Simmer with chickpeas for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Serve hot over rice, garnished with onion rings and coriander.
